TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Metapay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 89 buwan, 281 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 263 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Metapay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Metapay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Metapay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Metapay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Metapay hya' ga Metuiy. tay mkyahu' na Metapay hya' ga M'yutak. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ metapaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa metuij. taj mkjaħuʔ na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa mʔjutak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Metapay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 89 buwan, 281 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 263 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 18 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Metapay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Metapay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Metapay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Metapay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Metapay hya' ga Metuiy. tay mkyahu' na Metapay hya' ga M'yutak. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ metapaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa metuij. taj mkjaħuʔ na metapaj ħjaʔ ɣa mʔjutak. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
